Normalize Dataset Column Names for ggpaintr

Source: R/paintr-data.R
ggpaintr_normalize_column_names.Rd

Normalize incoming column names so var placeholders can require exact, syntactic, unique column-name matches at runtime.

Usage

ggpaintr_normalize_column_names(data)

Arguments

data

A data frame or an object coercible with as.data.frame().

Value

A tabular object with ggpaintr-safe column names. Existing data.frame subclasses keep their class. Names are made syntactic, unique, and safe against reserved-word collisions. Non-data.frame inputs return the data.frame created by as.data.frame().

Examples

messy <- data.frame(
  check.names = FALSE,
  "first column" = 1:3,
  "if" = 4:6
)

clean <- ggpaintr_normalize_column_names(messy)
names(clean)
#> [1] "first_column" "if_"
